Jasprit Bumrah Stuns With 3 Wickets in Third T20I Heroics

Jan 26, 2026 • 8JJ Sports

Jasprit Bumrah Stuns With 3 Wickets in Third T20I Heroics

Jasprit Bumrah returned to top form with a spectacular performance in the third T20I against New Zealand at Barsapara Cricket Stadium in Guwahati. The ace pacer claimed 3 wickets for just 17 runs in his four-over spell, cementing his reputation as one of the world’s best T20 bowlers.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here:
👉 Jasprit Bumrah Stuns With 3 Wickets in Third T20I Heroics
